content:
📜 Finalizing mechanics for running from checks and betrayal caps.

✔ Running from Skill Checks (Finalized Version)
• Players can attempt to flee but must roll for it.
• Roll of 7+ → Escape successful.
• Roll of 4-6 → Escape with debuff.
• Roll of 1-3 → Escape failed + forced penalty.

✔ Betrayal Limits & Cooldowns
• Players can only betray twice per semester before suffering faction exile.
• Betrayers must wait three weeks before attempting another defection.
• One-Time Betrayals Exist for Key Moments (e.g., a major endgame decision).

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents spammed betrayal mechanics.
✔ Ensures betrayal remains a strategic event, not casual.
✔ Adds cooldowns so players don’t abuse the system.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 473 (chunk 473/555)
